testcase.name: App Component > renders the calculator display
App Component > updates display when number buttons are clicked
App Component > performs addition correctly
App Component > clears the display when AC is clicked
App Component > deletes the last character when DEL is clicked
App Component > shows Error for invalid expressions
calculator logic > should handle basic addition
calculator logic > should handle subtraction
calculator logic > should handle multiplication
calculator logic > should handle division
calculator logic > should handle percentage
calculator logic > should clear the output on AC
calculator logic > should delete the last character on DEL
calculator logic > should handle invalid expressions
calculator logic > should not allow starting with a special character
calculator logic > should append numbers and operators
Multiplication and Division operations > Multiplication > should multiply two positive numbers
Multiplication and Division operations > Multiplication > should multiply positive and negative numbers
Multiplication and Division operations > Multiplication > should multiply two decimal numbers
Multiplication and Division operations > Multiplication > should handle multiplication by zero
Multiplication and Division operations > Division > should divide two positive numbers
Multiplication and Division operations > Division > should divide to result in a decimal
Multiplication and Division operations > Division > should handle division by zero
Multiplication and Division operations > Division > should handle negative division
